{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Aurelian Emperor
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Aurelian Emperor]]'s voice is packed with [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aurelian Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] is strong enough to erase the wills of ordinary men and women.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
